nasb.text: in a moment, in the twinkling of an eye, at the last trumpet; for the trumpet will sound, and the dead will be raised imperishable, and we will be changed.

esv.text: in a moment, in the twinkling of an eye, at the last trumpet. For the trumpet will sound, and the dead will be raised imperishable, and we shall be changed.

ccb.text: 就在一刹那，眨眼之间，最后的号角吹响的时候。因为号角一吹响，死人就要复活成为永不朽坏的，我们也要改变。

csbs.text: 就在一刹那，眨眼之间，在那最后的号角声中。 的确，号角要吹响，死人要复活成为不朽坏的，我们也要被改变；
